button.name: Button
button.description: 6 variants · 3 sizes · 3 shapes · disabled + loading states. Built on Base UI's Button primitive.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the button

props.name: size
props.description: Controls height, padding, and font size

props.name: shape
props.description: Border radius and aspect ratio

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon element rendered beside the label

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Side the icon appears on

props.name: iconOnly
props.description: Show only the icon — hides the text label and forces square sizing. Use children for accessible screen-reader text.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretches button to fill its container

props.name: type
props.description: Native button type attribute

props.name: loading
props.description: Replaces leading content with a spinner; disables interaction

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Where the spinner appears — start prepends it beside the label, center hides the label and centers the spinner

props.name: pressed
props.description: Toggle state for aria-pressed buttons — applies a depressed visual and sets aria-pressed on the element

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and reduces opacity to 40%

checkbox.name: Checkbox
checkbox.description: An accessible checkbox with emerald checked state and optional label. Built on Base UI's Checkbox primitive.

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered beside the checkbox

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary help text rendered below the label

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the checkbox and indicator size

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Shows a dash instead of a checkmark; used for partial selection

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state — use with onCheckedChange for fully controlled behavior

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Initial checked state for uncontrolled use

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: Callback fired when checked state changes

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name for native form submission

props.name: value
props.description: Form value submitted when the checkbox is checked

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required for form validation — adds a red asterisk next to the label

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and reduces opacity

usage.label: With description
usage.code: <UICheckbox label="Marketing emails" description="Receive updates about new components and features." />

usage.label: Sizes
usage.code:
<UICheckbox size="sm" label="Small" />
<UICheckbox size="md" label="Medium" />
<UICheckbox size="lg" label="Large" />

input.name: Input
input.description: A dark text input with inset shadow, emerald focus ring, and full disabled/read-only state support.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface style — outline adds border, filled uses a background, ghost is borderless

props.name: size
props.description: Controls input height and font size

props.name: type
props.description: Native input type — affects keyboard, autofill hints, and browser behaviour

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the input; automatically linked via htmlFor

props.name: helperText
props.description: Subtle help text shown below the input (hidden when error is present)

props.name: prefix
props.description: Content pinned to the left inside the input — icon, currency symbol, or text

props.name: suffix
props.description: Content pinned to the right inside the input — icon or unit label

props.name: clearable
props.description: Shows an × button when the input has a value; clicking it clears the field

props.name: error
props.description: Error state — pass a string to show an error message below

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when empty

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables input and reduces opacity

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Makes the input read-only

usage.label: Variants
usage.code:
<UIInput variant="outline" placeholder="Outline" />
<UIInput variant="filled" placeholder="Filled" />
<UIInput variant="ghost" placeholder="Ghost" />

usage.label: Types
usage.code:
<UIInput type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
<UIInput type="password" placeholder="Password" />
<UIInput type="search" placeholder="Search…" clearable />

usage.label: With label & helper
usage.code: <UIInput label="Email" helperText="We'll never share your email." placeholder="you@example.com" />

radio-group.name: Radio Group
radio-group.description: An accessible radio group using Base UI Radio + RadioGroup primitives. Emerald accent on selection.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of selectable options

props.name: label
props.description: Group label rendered above the options

props.name: orientation
props.description: Stacks options in a column or row

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the radio button and dot size

props.name: disabledOptions
props.description: Array of option values that should be rendered as disabled and non-interactive

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initially selected value

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name for native form submission

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the radio group as required — adds a red asterisk next to the group label

usage.label: Horizontal
usage.code: <UIRadioGroup orientation="horizontal" options={[{ label: 'Yes', value: 'yes' }, { label: 'No', value: 'no' }]} />

usage.label: Disabled options
usage.code: <UIRadioGroup disabledOptions={['b']} options={[{ label: 'Option A', value: 'a' }, { label: 'Option B (disabled)', value: 'b' }, { label: 'Option C', value: 'c' }]} />

select.name: Select
select.description: A dark dropdown select with glass-effect popup, highlighted states, and a check mark on the selected item.

props.name: options
props.description: Options rendered inside the popup — defaults to a built-in sample list when omitted

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Shown when no value is selected

props.name: multiSelect
props.description: Allow selecting multiple options; the trigger shows selected labels joined by commas

props.name: clearable
props.description: Shows an × button when a value is selected; clicking it clears the selection

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner in the trigger; useful while options are being fetched

usage.label: Default
usage.code: <UISelect options={[{ label: 'Design System', value: 'ds' }, { label: 'Component Library', value: 'cl' }, { label: 'Style Guide', value: 'sg' }]} />

usage.label: Clearable
usage.code: <UISelect clearable options={[{ label: 'Option A', value: 'a' }, { label: 'Option B', value: 'b' }]} />

usage.label: Multi-select
usage.code: <UISelect multiSelect clearable options={[{ label: 'Design System', value: 'ds' }, { label: 'Component Library', value: 'cl' }, { label: 'Style Guide', value: 'sg' }]} />

slider.name: Slider
slider.description: A range slider with emerald fill track and a thumb that grows on active. Built on Base UI's Slider primitive.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial value of the slider handle

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum allowed value

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum allowed value

props.name: step
props.description: Increment step between values

props.name: showValue
props.description: Show the current value above the track

props.name: orientation
props.description: Horizontal track (default) or vertical track

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and reduces opacity

switch.name: Switch
switch.description: A toggle switch that transitions to emerald when active. Thumb translates smoothly on state change.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label rendered beside the switch

props.name: size
props.description: Controls track and thumb dimensions

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Side the label appears on relative to the switch

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner inside the thumb and disables interaction — use while saving the toggle state

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled on/off state — use with onCheckedChange for fully controlled behavior

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Initial on/off state for uncontrolled use

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction

usage.label: Sizes
usage.code:
<UISwitch size="sm" label="Small" />
<UISwitch size="md" label="Medium" />
<UISwitch size="lg" label="Large" />

avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.description: Avatar with image support, text fallback, shape, size, and status dot. Built on Base UI's Avatar primitive.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL — shows fallback if missing or broken

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the image

props.name: fallback
props.description: Initials shown when image is absent (used when fallbackType is "text")

props.name: fallbackType
props.description: Fallback content style — text shows initials, icon shows a generic user silhouette

props.name: size
props.description: Avatar diameter

props.name: shape
props.description: Rounded circle or square with rounded corners

props.name: status
props.description: Status indicator dot — green, grey, or red

props.name: bordered
props.description: Adds an emerald accent ring around the avatar

usage.label: Sizes
usage.code:
<UIAvatar size="xs" fallback="XS" />
<UIAvatar size="sm" fallback="SM" />
<UIAvatar size="md" fallback="MD" />
<UIAvatar size="lg" fallback="LG" />
<UIAvatar size="xl" fallback="XL" />

usage.label: Status
usage.code:
<UIAvatar fallback="ON" status="online" />
<UIAvatar fallback="OF" status="offline" />
<UIAvatar fallback="BZ" status="busy" />

separator.name: Separator
separator.description: A thin 1px rule that divides content. Horizontal (default) splits stacked sections; vertical splits inline items such as nav links.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Direction of the separator line

tabs.name: Tabs
tabs.description: Tab bar with a sliding emerald underline indicator. Panels swap on selection.

props.name: tabs
props.type: { label: string; value: string; content: ReactNode; icon?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: Tab definitions — each may include an optional icon

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initially active tab value

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretches tabs to fill the full width of the container evenly

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Side the tab icon appears on relative to the label

usage.label: Full width
usage.code: <UITabs fullWidth tabs={[{ label: 'Code', value: 'code', content: 'Code panel.' }, { label: 'Preview', value: 'preview', content: 'Preview panel.' }]} />

usage.label: Custom tabs
usage.code: <UITabs tabs={[{ label: 'Code', value: 'code', content: 'Code panel.' }, { label: 'Preview', value: 'preview', content: 'Preview panel.' }]} />

progress.name: Progress
progress.description: A linear progress bar with optional label and value display. Emerald fill, zinc-800 track.

props.name: value
props.description: Progress percentage (0–100)

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label shown above the track

props.name: showValue
props.description: Shows the numeric percentage alongside the label

props.name: striped
props.description: Adds a diagonal stripe pattern to the fill bar

props.name: animated
props.description: Animates the stripes — only visible when striped is true

props.name: color
props.description: Custom CSS color for the fill (e.g. "#6366f1" or "oklch(0.6 0.2 280)"). Falls back to emerald when unset.

accordion.name: Accordion
accordion.description: Collapsible panels with a chevron indicator that rotates on open. Divided by zinc-800 rules.

props.name: items
props.type: { value: string; title: string; content: string }[]
props.description: Array of accordion panels

props.name: bordered
props.description: Wraps the entire accordion in a rounded border

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Side the chevron icon appears on in each row header

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow multiple panels to be open at the same time. When false, opening one closes others.

tooltip.name: Tooltip
tooltip.description: A dark glass tooltip anchored to its trigger with configurable side placement.

props.name: content
props.description: Content rendered inside the tooltip popup

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger element that shows the tooltip on hover

props.name: side
props.description: Side of the trigger where the popup appears

props.name: delay
props.description: Milliseconds to wait before showing the tooltip on hover

props.name: delayClose
props.description: Milliseconds to wait before hiding the tooltip after the cursor leaves

props.name: arrow
props.description: Renders a small directional arrow pointing from the popup toward the trigger

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the tooltip popup in pixels

usage.label: Max width
usage.code: <UITooltip maxWidth={160} content="This tooltip wraps long content at the specified max width.">Long tooltip</UITooltip>

dialog.name: Dialog
dialog.description: A centered modal dialog with dark glass surface, backdrop blur, and confirm/cancel actions.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Text rendered on the trigger button

props.name: title
props.description: Dialog heading

props.name: description
props.description: Body text shown below the heading

props.name: showCloseButton
props.description: Renders an × button in the top-right corner of the dialog header

props.name: closeOnOutsideClick
props.description: Closes the dialog when the user clicks outside the popup

props.name: footer
props.description: Custom footer content — replaces the default Cancel / Confirm button pair when provided

usage.label: Custom content
usage.code: <UIDialog trigger="Delete" title="Delete item" description="This cannot be undone." />

popover.name: Popover
popover.description: A dark glass popover anchored to its trigger. Includes a close button and description slot.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Text rendered on the trigger button

props.name: title
props.description: Popover heading

props.name: content
props.description: Body content inside the popover

props.name: arrow
props.description: Renders a small directional arrow pointing from the popup toward the trigger

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the popover in pixels

props.name: offset
props.description: Gap in pixels between the trigger and the popup

props.name: placement
props.description: Side the popup opens on relative to the trigger

usage.label: Custom content
usage.code: <UIPopover title="Filters" content="Adjust your display filters here." />

card.name: Card
card.description: A flexible surface container for grouping related content. Supports bordered and hoverable variants.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface style — default uses card bg + border, bordered is transparent with a thicker border

props.name: padding
props.description: Internal padding of the card

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius of the card

props.name: shadow
props.description: Adds a subtle drop shadow beneath the card

props.name: hoverable
props.description: Adds a lift + shadow effect on hover

props.name: clickable
props.description: Makes the card interactive — adds cursor-pointer and keyboard focus support

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler; also enables clickable styles when provided

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card

badge.name: Badge
badge.description: A compact label for status indicators, counts, or metadata. Supports solid, soft, and outline styles across six colors.

props.name: variant
props.description: Fill style of the badge

props.name: color
props.description: Color palette applied to the badge

props.name: size
props.description: Controls badge height and text size

props.name: dot
props.description: Prepends a small colored dot — useful for status indicators

props.name: rounded
props.description: Uses fully rounded (pill) corners instead of the default rounded-md

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon rendered before the label (ignored when dot is true)

props.name: children
props.description: Badge label text

chip.name: Chip
chip.description: An interactive filter or selection token. Supports selected state and a removable dismiss button.

props.name: selected
props.description: Highlights the chip with the emerald accent to indicate active selection

props.name: removable
props.description: Renders an × button on the right that calls onRemove when clicked

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Callback fired when the remove button is clicked

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler — also enables button role and keyboard support

props.name: size
props.description: Controls chip height, padding, and text size

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon rendered before the label

props.name: children
props.description: Chip label text

alert.name: Alert
alert.description: An inline status message in four severity levels: info, success, warning, and error. Optionally dismissible.

props.name: variant
props.description: Determines the color scheme and default icon

props.name: title
props.description: Optional bold heading above the description

props.name: description
props.description: Main body text of the alert

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom icon — overrides the default variant icon when provided

props.name: closable
props.description: Shows a dismiss button that hides the alert on click

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback fired when the dismiss button is clicked

props.name: autoClose
props.description: Auto-dismiss after this many milliseconds. Omit to keep the alert until manually closed.

props.name: showProgress
props.description: Shrinking bar at the bottom that shows time remaining until autoClose dismisses the alert

usage.label: Variants
usage.code:
<UIAlert variant="info" description="Your request is being processed." />
<UIAlert variant="success" description="Changes saved successfully." />
<UIAlert variant="warning" description="Your plan is almost at its limit." />
<UIAlert variant="error" description="Unable to connect to the server." />

usage.label: With title
usage.code: <UIAlert variant="error" title="Upload failed" description="The file exceeds the 10 MB size limit." />

usage.label: Dismissible
usage.code: <UIAlert variant="success" title="Done!" description="All changes saved." closable />

toast.name: Toast
toast.description: Transient notifications that slide in from the corner. Uses Base UI Toast with a global toastManager for triggering outside React.

props.name: timeout
props.description: Default auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds. Pass 0 to require manual close (no auto-dismiss).

props.name: showProgress
props.description: Shows a shrinking progress bar on every toast indicating time remaining until auto-dismiss

props.name: limit
props.description: Maximum number of toasts shown at once

props.name: children
props.description: App content wrapped by the toast provider

usage.label: Default
usage.code:
import { toastManager } from '@/designs/feedback/toast/Component';
toastManager.add({ data: { title: 'Hello!', description: 'Welcome back.' } });

usage.label: Success
usage.code: toastManager.add({ data: { variant: 'success', title: 'Saved', description: 'Your changes are saved.' } });

usage.label: Error
usage.code: toastManager.add({ data: { variant: 'error', title: 'Failed', description: 'Something went wrong.' } });

usage.label: With progress
usage.code: toastManager.add({ data: { variant: 'success', title: 'Saved', description: 'All changes saved.', showProgress: true } });

dropdown-menu.name: Dropdown Menu
dropdown-menu.description: A keyboard-navigable dropdown menu with icons, keyboard shortcuts, separators, and a danger style. Built on Base UI Menu primitive.

props.name: triggerLabel
props.description: Text label on the default trigger button

props.name: trigger
props.description: Custom trigger element — replaces the default trigger button when provided

props.name: items
props.description: Array of menu items. Each item: { label, icon?, shortcut?, disabled?, danger?, separator? }

props.name: align
props.description: Horizontal alignment of the popup relative to the trigger

props.name: side
props.description: Side the popup opens on relative to the trigger

usage.label: Custom items
usage.code: <UIDropdownMenu items={[{ label: 'Profile' }, { label: 'Settings', shortcut: '⌘,' }, { separator: true, label: '' }, { label: 'Log out', danger: true }]} />

usage.label: Custom trigger
usage.code: <UIDropdownMenu trigger={<button>⋮</button>} items={[{ label: 'Edit' }, { label: 'Delete', danger: true }]} />

textarea.name: Textarea
textarea.description: Multi-line text input with label, description, error/helper text, resize control, size variants, and a loading overlay.

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the textarea

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary help text below the label

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder shown when empty

props.name: rows
props.description: Number of visible text rows

props.name: resize
props.description: CSS resize direction

props.name: size
props.description: Controls padding and font size

props.name: error
props.description: Error message shown below — replaces helperText when present

props.name: helperText
props.description: Subtle help text below the textarea (hidden when error is present)

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner overlay and disables interaction

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and reduces opacity

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Makes the textarea read-only

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required — adds a red asterisk to the label

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Maximum character count

usage.label: With description
usage.code: <UITextarea label="Feedback" description="Tell us what you think." placeholder="Your thoughts…" />

usage.label: Sizes
usage.code:
<UITextarea size="sm" label="Small" />
<UITextarea size="md" label="Medium" />
<UITextarea size="lg" label="Large" />

radio.name: Radio
radio.description: A single radio button with optional label and description. Built on Base UI's Radio primitive.

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered beside the radio

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary help text below the label

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the radio button and dot size

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Initial checked state for uncontrolled use

props.name: loading
props.description: Replaces the radio with a spinner while state is saving

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction

usage.label: Sizes
usage.code:
<UIRadio size="sm" label="Small" />
<UIRadio size="md" label="Medium" />
<UIRadio size="lg" label="Large" />

combobox.name: Combobox
combobox.description: A searchable selection input with multi-select, chip display, clear button, and loading state. Built on Base UI Combobox.

props.name: options
props.type: { label: string; value: string; disabled?: boolean }[]
props.description: Selectable options rendered in the popup

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Input placeholder

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow selecting multiple options, displayed as chips

props.name: clearable
props.description: Shows an × button to clear the current selection

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner — use while options are fetching

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the combobox

props.name: error
props.description: Error message shown below

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Shown when the options list is empty

date-picker.name: Date Picker
date-picker.description: A date selection input with a calendar popup. Supports single, range, and multi-date selection with min/max constraints.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Shown when no date is selected

props.name: range
props.description: Enable date range selection — click start then end date

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow toggling multiple individual dates

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the trigger and calendar interaction

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the trigger

props.name: error
props.description: Error message shown below

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP 47 locale used to format displayed dates

field.name: Field
field.description: A form field wrapper providing label, description, and error with accessibility linking. Built on Base UI's Field primitive.

props.name: label
props.description: Field label linked to the control via htmlFor

props.name: description
props.description: Help text below the label

props.name: error
props.description: Error message shown below the control

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field required — adds a red asterisk to the label

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the control

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner beside the label while the field value is being saved

props.name: orientation
props.description: Stack label above or place it beside the control

usage.label: Default
usage.code: <UIField label="Email" description="We'll never share your email." />

table.name: Table
table.description: A basic data table with local sorting, row selection, loading skeletons, and empty state support.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions: { key, header, accessor?, sortable?, width? }

props.name: data
props.description: Row data array

props.name: caption
props.description: Table caption rendered above

props.name: sortable
props.description: Enable sorting on all columns

props.name: selectable
props.description: Show checkboxes for row selection

props.name: loading
props.description: Replace rows with animated skeleton cells

data-table.name: Data Table
data-table.description: Advanced table with search, sorting, pagination, column visibility toggle, and row selection — all in one component.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions — each can be sortable, filterable, and togglable

props.name: data
props.description: Row data array

props.name: search
props.description: Show a search input that filters all string fields

props.name: sorting
props.description: Enable column header click to sort

props.name: pagination
props.description: Show prev/next/page number controls below the table

props.name: selection
props.description: Show checkboxes for multi-row selection

props.name: columnVisibility
props.description: Show a column toggle dropdown in the toolbar

props.name: loading
props.description: Show skeleton rows while data is loading

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Rows per page

skeleton.name: Skeleton
skeleton.description: A loading placeholder that mimics content shape. Supports rect, circle, line, and text shapes with pulse or wave animation.

props.name: shape
props.description: Skeleton shape — text auto-varies widths to simulate paragraph lines

props.name: animation
props.description: Animation style

props.name: count
props.description: Number of skeleton items to render stacked

props.name: width
props.description: Width — CSS string or pixel number

props.name: height
props.description: Height — CSS string or pixel number

props.name: loading
props.description: When false, renders children instead of the skeleton

empty.name: Empty
empty.description: An empty state panel with an icon, title, description, and optional action buttons.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading

props.name: description
props.default: "Add your first item to get started."
props.description: Supporting text below the title

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom icon — replaces the default inbox SVG

props.name: action
props.description: Primary action element (e.g. a button)

props.name: secondaryAction
props.description: Secondary action element

usage.label: With action
usage.code: <UIEmpty title="No components" description="Create your first component." action={<button>Create</button>} />

usage.label: Custom title
usage.code: <UIEmpty title="No results" description="Try a different search." />

alert-dialog.name: Alert Dialog
alert-dialog.description: A blocking confirmation dialog. Supports destructive mode, loading state on the confirm button, and size variants.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Element that opens the dialog

props.name: title
props.description: Dialog heading

props.name: description
props.description: Body text

props.name: confirmText
props.description: Label on the confirm button

props.name: cancelText
props.description: Label on the cancel button

props.name: destructive
props.description: Colors the confirm button red to signal a dangerous action

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner on the confirm button and disables it

props.name: size
props.description: Width of the dialog popup

usage.label: Destructive
usage.code: <UIAlertDialog destructive confirmText="Delete" title="Delete item" description="This will permanently remove the item." />

sonner.name: Sonner
sonner.description: A toast notification system with type variants, position control, action buttons, and dismiss support. Built on Base UI Toast.

props.name: message
props.description: Toast body text

props.name: title
props.description: Optional bold heading above the message

props.name: type
props.description: Determines the icon and border accent color

props.name: duration
props.description: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds

props.name: position
props.description: Corner the toast stack appears in

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Show a close button on each toast

usage.label: Success
usage.code: <UISonner type="success" title="Saved" message="All changes saved successfully." />

spinner.name: Spinner
spinner.description: A circular loading indicator in five sizes. Disappears when loading is false.

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter of the spinner

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text shown beside the spinner

props.name: loading
props.description: When false, renders nothing

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for screen readers

drawer.name: Drawer
drawer.description: A swipe-dismissible temporary side or bottom panel with title, description, and loading state. Built on Base UI Drawer.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Element that triggers the drawer

props.name: title
props.description: Heading inside the drawer

props.name: description
props.description: Subheading below the title

props.name: position
props.description: Side the drawer slides in from

props.name: size
props.description: Width (horizontal) or height (vertical) of the panel

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Allow closing by clicking the backdrop or pressing Escape

props.name: overlay
props.description: Show a backdrop behind the drawer

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a spinner centered in the content area

sheet.name: Sheet
sheet.description: A persistent side panel that slides in from any edge. Unlike Drawer, it uses the Dialog primitive — no swipe dismiss.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Element that opens the sheet

props.name: title
props.description: Heading inside the sheet header

props.name: description
props.description: Subheading below the title

props.name: side
props.description: Edge the sheet slides in from

props.name: size
props.description: Width (horizontal) or height (vertical) of the panel

props.name: closeButton
props.description: Show an × close button in the header

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a spinner in the content area

sidebar.name: Sidebar
sidebar.description: An application navigation sidebar with collapse support, nested items, badges, and active state tracking.

props.name: items
props.description: Navigation items: { key, label, icon?, href?, badge?, disabled?, children? }

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Show a collapse toggle button at the bottom of the sidebar

props.name: defaultCollapsed
props.description: Start collapsed (icon-only mode)

props.name: activeItem
props.description: Key of the currently active item (controlled)

props.name: header
props.description: Content rendered at the top of the sidebar

props.name: footer
props.description: Content rendered at the bottom before the collapse button

breadcrumb.name: Breadcrumb
breadcrumb.description: A page hierarchy trail with configurable separator, ellipsis truncation for long paths, and aria-current on the last item.

props.name: items
props.type: { label: string; href?: string; icon?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: Breadcrumb trail items — last item is treated as current page

props.name: separator
props.description: Separator rendered between items

props.name: maxItems
props.description: Collapse middle items into … when the trail exceeds this count; click to expand

usage.label: Custom separator
usage.code: <UIBreadcrumb separator="›" items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Docs', href: '/docs' }, { label: 'Components' }]} />

usage.label: Truncated
usage.code: <UIBreadcrumb maxItems={2} items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Components', href: '/components' }, { label: 'Inputs', href: '/inputs' }, { label: 'Breadcrumb' }]} />

command.name: Command
command.description: A keyboard-driven command palette with grouped commands, fuzzy search, arrow-key navigation, and a global ⌘K shortcut.

props.name: groups
props.description: Command groups: { heading?, items: { key, label, description?, icon?, shortcut?, disabled? }[] }

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Search input placeholder

props.name: shortcut
props.description: Display label for the keyboard shortcut (shown on trigger). ⌘K is always registered.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Shown when search yields no results

props.name: size
props.description: Max width of the palette popup

usage.label: Custom groups
usage.code: <UICommand groups={[{ heading: 'Pages', items: [{ key: 'home', label: 'Home' }, { key: 'about', label: 'About' }] }]} />

pagination.name: Pagination
pagination.description: A page navigation control with smart ellipsis, first/last shortcuts, and size variants. Controlled and uncontrolled.

props.name: totalPages
props.description: Total number of pages

props.name: defaultPage
props.description: Initial page for uncontrolled use

props.name: siblingCount
props.description: Pages shown on each side of the current page before an ellipsis appears

props.name: showFirstLast
props.description: Show ⟪ / ⟫ jump-to-first and jump-to-last buttons

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable all buttons

props.name: size
props.description: Button height and font size
